name: claude-control
description: Claude Control — a Discord-style AI control center for building and orchestrating Claude-powered agents.

scripts.desktop: npm run build -w @cc/web && npm run build -w @cc/server && npm run start -w @cc/desktop
scripts.dist: npm run build -w @cc/web && npm run build -w @cc/server && npm run dist -w @cc/desktop
scripts.release: npm run build -w @cc/web && npm run build -w @cc/server && npm run release -w @cc/desktop
scripts.app: npm run build -w @cc/web && npm run serve -w @cc/server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @cc/server" "npm run dev -w @cc/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cc/server && npm run build -w @cc/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @cc/server && npm run lint -w @cc/web
